scripts.lint: eslint src e2e playwright.config.ts vitest.config.ts vitest.ui.config.ts next.config.ts --max-warnings 0
scripts.test: npm run test:logic && npm run test:ui
scripts.test:scripts: npm run test:scripts:unit && npm run test:scripts:checks
scripts.test:scripts:checks: node scripts/check-outbound-fetch.mjs && node scripts/check-security-enforcement-matrix.mjs --strict && node scripts/check-subprocessors-drift.mjs && node scripts/check-next-public-surface.mjs && node scripts/check-unsafe-deserialization.mjs && node scripts/check-server-action-auth-contract.mjs && node scripts/check-deterministic-org-resolution.mjs && node scripts/check-server-action-negative-tests.mjs && node scripts/check-persistence-redaction.mjs && node scripts/check-sentry-tag-banlist.mjs && node scripts/check-p6-na-register.mjs && node scripts/check-migration-security-patterns.mjs --strict && node scripts/check-dangerously-set-inner-html.mjs && node scripts/check-sbom-diff.mjs && node scripts/check-public-seo-surface.mjs && node scripts/check-upload-banlist.mjs && node scripts/check-codeowners-security-paths.mjs && node scripts/check-docker-hardening.mjs && node scripts/check-npm-lifecycle.mjs && node scripts/check-certificate-transparency.mjs && CT_STRICT=1 node scripts/check-certificate-transparency.mjs && node scripts/check-no-executable-notebooks.mjs && node scripts/check-supply-chain-waivers.mjs && node scripts/check-postmessage-origins.mjs && node scripts/check-next-script-integrity.mjs && OBLIXA_STRICT_BODY_LIMITS=1 BODY_LIMIT_MIN_ROUTES=64 node scripts/check-json-body-limited-adoption.mjs && node scripts/check-github-scheduled-workflows-secrets.mjs && node scripts/check-api-runtime-smoke-registry.mjs && npm run check:maximal-assurance-scaffolding
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:logic:coverage && npm run test:ui:coverage
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: playwright test e2e/smoke.spec.ts e2e/auth-flow.spec.ts e2e/marketing-public.spec.ts e2e/external-public.spec.ts e2e/security-api.spec.ts e2e/cron-routes-smoke.spec.ts e2e/security-headers-smoke.spec.ts e2e/public-token-route-states.spec.ts e2e/ui-resilience.spec.ts e2e/ui-resilience-api.spec.ts && PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_AUTH_STORAGE=1 playwright test e2e/current-product-core-smoke.spec.ts e2e/settings-security.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ui-qa-plan: playwright test e2e/public-route-h1-contract.spec.ts e2e/a11y.nightly-optional-marketing-axe.spec.ts e2e/ui-qa-upload-emulation-perf.spec.ts e2e/ui-qa-http-client-status-mocks.spec.ts e2e/ui-qa-skip-lab-tiers.spec.ts e2e/rtl-ime-pseudo-locale-smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:compatibility:visual: PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_AUTH=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_AUTH_STORAGE=1 playwright test e2e/compatibility-visual-optional.spec.ts --grep @compatibility
scripts.test:e2e:compatibility:visual:update: PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_AUTH=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_AUTH_STORAGE=1 playwright test e2e/compatibility-visual-optional.spec.ts --grep @compatibility --update-snapshots
scripts.test:e2e:a11y: playwright test e2e/a11y.spec.ts e2e/a11y.landmarks.spec.ts e2e/a11y.keyboard.spec.ts e2e/a11y.dialogs.spec.ts e2e/a11y.forms.spec.ts e2e/a11y.route-states.spec.ts e2e/public-route-h1-contract.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:visual: PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 playwright test e2e/visual.public.spec.ts e2e/visual.external.spec.ts e2e/visual.route-states.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:visual:update: PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 playwright test e2e/visual.public.spec.ts e2e/visual.external.spec.ts e2e/visual.route-states.spec.ts --update-snapshots
scripts.test:e2e:visual:auth: PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_AUTH=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_AUTH_STORAGE=1 playwright test e2e/visual.shell.spec.ts e2e/visual.core.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:visual:auth:update: PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_AUTH=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_AUTH_STORAGE=1 playwright test e2e/visual.shell.spec.ts e2e/visual.core.spec.ts --update-snapshots
scripts.test:e2e:visual:persona: PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_AUTH=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_AUTH_STORAGE=1 playwright test e2e/persona-dashboard-visual-qa.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:visual:persona:update: PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_AUTH=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_AUTH_STORAGE=1 playwright test e2e/persona-dashboard-visual-qa.spec.ts --update-snapshots
scripts.test:e2e:visual:persona:advanced: PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_AUTH=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_ADVANCED=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_AUTH_STORAGE=1 playwright test e2e/persona-dashboard-visual-qa.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:visual:persona:advanced:update: PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_AUTH=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_ADVANCED=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_AUTH_STORAGE=1 playwright test e2e/persona-dashboard-visual-qa.spec.ts --update-snapshots
scripts.test:e2e:visual:advanced: PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_ADVANCED=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_AUTH_STORAGE=1 playwright test e2e/visual.advanced.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:visual:advanced:update: PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_ADVANCED=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_AUTH_STORAGE=1 playwright test e2e/visual.advanced.spec.ts --update-snapshots
scripts.test:e2e:visual:assurance: PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_ASSURANCE=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_AUTH_STORAGE=1 playwright test e2e/visual.assurance.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:visual:assurance:update: PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_ASSURANCE=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_AUTH_STORAGE=1 playwright test e2e/visual.assurance.spec.ts --update-snapshots
scripts.test:e2e:visual:full: PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 playwright test e2e/visual.public.spec.ts e2e/visual.external.spec.ts e2e/visual.route-states.spec.ts && PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_AUTH=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_ADVANCED=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_ASSURANCE=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_AUTH_STORAGE=1 playwright test e2e/visual.shell.spec.ts e2e/visual.core.spec.ts e2e/visual.advanced.spec.ts e2e/visual.assurance.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:visual:full:update: PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 playwright test e2e/visual.public.spec.ts e2e/visual.external.spec.ts e2e/visual.route-states.spec.ts --update-snapshots && PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_AUTH=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_ADVANCED=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_ASSURANCE=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_AUTH_STORAGE=1 playwright test e2e/visual.shell.spec.ts e2e/visual.core.spec.ts e2e/visual.advanced.spec.ts e2e/visual.assurance.spec.ts --update-snapshots
scripts.test:e2e:visual:full:continue: PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 playwright test e2e/visual.public.spec.ts e2e/visual.external.spec.ts e2e/visual.route-states.spec.ts || true; PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_AUTH=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_ADVANCED=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_ASSURANCE=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_AUTH_STORAGE=1 playwright test e2e/visual.shell.spec.ts e2e/visual.core.spec.ts e2e/visual.advanced.spec.ts e2e/visual.assurance.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:visual:full:continue:update: PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 playwright test e2e/visual.public.spec.ts e2e/visual.external.spec.ts e2e/visual.route-states.spec.ts --update-snapshots || true; PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_AUTH=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_ADVANCED=1 PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_ASSURANCE=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_AUTH_STORAGE=1 playwright test e2e/visual.shell.spec.ts e2e/visual.core.spec.ts e2e/visual.advanced.spec.ts e2e/visual.assurance.spec.ts --update-snapshots
scripts.test:e2e:onboarding: E2E_ONBOARDING_BLOCKING=1 E2E_ONBOARDING_A11Y=1 E2E_ONBOARDING_EXPORT=1 playwright test e2e/onboarding-calibration.spec.ts e2e/authenticated.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:onboarding-deep: PLAYWRIGHT_ONBOARDING_DEEP=1 E2E_ONBOARDING_BLOCKING=1 E2E_ONBOARDING_A11Y=1 E2E_ONBOARDING_EXPORT=1 playwright test e2e/onboarding-calibration.spec.ts e2e/security-api.spec.ts
scripts.check:surface:suite: node scripts/pipelines/pipeline-surface-suite.mjs && echo "check:surface:page-inventory check:surface:api-inventory check:surface:action-inventory check:surface:acceptance-matrix check:surface:api-eligibility check:surface:action-eligibility check:surface:hrefs:strict check:surface:vocabulary check:workflow-destinations check:api-route-tests check:api-route-auth-contract check:api-route-auth-route-index check:server-lib-admin check:surface:diagnostics-contract check:route-inventory check:surface:denial-mapping check:surface:supplemental-contracts refinement-contract.test.ts"
scripts.check:debugging-sweep: npm run validate:debugging-sweep-provenance && npm run validate:debugging-sweep-revisions && node scripts/generate-debugging-sweep-catalog.mjs --check && npm run validate:debugging-sweep-closure
scripts.check:quick: npm run check:migrations && npm run check:vercel-cron-canary-parity && npm run check:api-route-tests && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.report:security-docs: npm run report:security-api-coverage && npm run report:security-api-auth-heuristics && npm run report:security-server-actions && npm run report:security-lib-admin
scripts.generate:qa-route-matrices: node scripts/generate-public-route-matrix.mjs && node scripts/generate-authenticated-route-matrix.mjs && node scripts/generate-route-state-matrix.mjs && node scripts/generate-visual-route-matrix.mjs
scripts.security:sweep:quarterly: npm run report:security-docs && npm run check:security-static:grep
scripts.security:sweep:full: npm run report:security-docs && npm run check:security-static && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.security:audit:maximal: npm run check:required-security-checkset && npm run check:security-report-checksums && npm run check:security-fetch-sinks:strict
scripts.perf:sweep:quarterly: npm run check:performance-static && npm run build
scripts.perf:sweep:full: npm run perf:sweep:quarterly && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run analyze
scripts.qa:sweep:local-ci: npm run qa:sweep:ci-static && npm run qa:sweep:ci-unit
scripts.qa:sweep:extended: npm run qa:sweep:local-ci && npm run check:qa-loading-routes && npm run check:qa-route-coverage-tsv && npm run check:qa-bug-log && npm run check:refinement-acceptance-commands
